description: AI Rights Spectrum — AI rights over content expressed as graduated, independently licensable levels.

spectrum.name: No AI Access
spectrum.description: AI systems may not access the resource.

spectrum.name: Read Only
spectrum.description: AI systems may read the resource but may not summarize, store, transform, or train.

spectrum.name: Read and Summarize
spectrum.description: AI systems may read and summarize with attribution.

spectrum.name: RAG Use
spectrum.description: AI systems may use the resource for retrieval-augmented generation under retention and attribution rules.

spectrum.name: Transform
spectrum.description: AI systems may transform the resource into structured data under license conditions.

spectrum.name: Fine-Tuning Use
spectrum.description: AI systems may use the resource for fine-tuning if explicitly licensed.

spectrum.name: Training Use
spectrum.description: AI systems may use the resource for model training if explicitly licensed.

spectrum.name: Commercial Redistribution
spectrum.description: AI systems may commercially redistribute derived outputs if explicitly licensed.

this_site.note: AGIRight.org content is open through Level 3 (RAG with attribution, retention 30 days). Levels 4-7 require a license: contact@agiright.org.
